blocked_on: want to confirm order of edits so create_jinja_env can also register your global filter registry to avoid conflicts

type: STATUS
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Done: prompt() now accepts optional filters param (works with/without parens), from_str/from_file accept filters, added create_jinja_env() helper centralizing filter registration. Tests pass, patch.txt written.

type: STATUS
files: outlines/prompts.py
summary: Done: added register_filter()/unregister_filter() global registry (_FILTERS dict), merged into env.filters at env creation (_template_from_str/_template_from_file) and re-synced in Prompt.__call__ so registry changes take effect on next render; local/built-in filters always take precedence over global ones with same name. Tests pass, patch.txt written.
